title: cladanthus eriolepis
intro: Cladanthus eriolepis, also known as the Mediterranean fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cladanthus eriolepis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Cladanthus eriolepis can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote healing and well-being.
